blinding: All Gray Fox Cowl.esm target records read with plugin="Gray Fox Cowl.esm" (own version), never the live winner 'Authoria - Patch - Gray Cowl of Nocturnal Requiem.esp' and never conflict_tree. Requiem comparables read normally: Requiem source values via plugins=["Requiem.esp"] (pre-Reqtificator INPUTS) for melee damage/crit, since melee weapon damage is Reqtificator-rescaled (RftI iron sword source 7 -> winner 42) and carrying the winner value would double-scale. Bows carry RFTI_Exclusions_NoDamageRescale so their source == final. Freshness probe: instance E:\Skyrim Modding\ARR 2.0, profile 'Authoria - Requiem Reforged'; Requiem.esp present in override chain of 012EB7:Skyrim.esm (winner 'Requiem for the Indifferent.esp' = live RftI profile, valid authority). Note: 'Authoria - RFTI Output' is DISABLED on this profile, so the hand-patch wins these records directly.

records.comparable: No Requiem Umbra exists. Nearest artifact-1H-sword structure: REQ_Artifact_Dawnbreaker 04E4EE (dmg 13, Daedric signature) / REQ_Artifact_RedEaglesBane (dmg 11, val 5000). Steel-tier source dmg would be 8.
records.flag_question: Author gives Umbra dmg 24 + Critical 24 with a WeapMaterialSteel keyword, but it is framed as a Daedric artifact (VendorItemDaedricArtifact + DaedricArtifact + MagicDisallowEnchanting + bespoke Soul Trap enchant + value 4500). Two things conflict: (1) dmg 24 is far above both the steel 1H source tier (8) and the Requiem 1H artifact-sword band (~11-13, e.g. Dawnbreaker 13); (2) crit is 24 (should be floor(dmg/2)). Resolve tier intent: (a) Daedric signature -> set dmg 13 (Dawnbreaker tier), crit 6, and raise the material keyword above Steel; or (b) keep Steel keyword -> dmg 8, crit 4. Bespoke value 4500 and the modded enchant are artifact-appropriate and kept either way.
records.ench_boundary: ObjectEffect 018080 -> manny_GF_Ench_Umbra (Soul Trap) is MODDED. Weapon-side charge/value derived here; ENCH/MGEF design routed to requiem-magic-patching (magic lane).
records.rationale: Genuine artifact (Daedric-artifact keyword set, not forge-craftable, temper-only via COBJ 014950). Deviating value/enchant is artifact-legitimate, but the dmg-24/steel-keyword pairing is internally inconsistent and crit is unset per floor(dmg/2). Flagged for tier decision rather than silently classified; recommended option-a fields provided.

notes: DERIVATION DOCTRINE (the load-bearing call): melee weapon DAMAGE/CRIT are carried at Requiem's SOURCE tier (read via plugins=["Requiem.esp"]), NOT the RftI live-winner value, because Requiem melee weapons are NOT RFTI-excluded and the Reqtificator rescales them each build (proof: REQ_Weapon_Iron_Sword source dmg 7 -> RftI winner dmg 42). Carrying the winner value would double-scale. This honors 'carry inputs, never hand-stamp Reqtificator outputs.' KEYWORDS, type-defined speed/reach, and material-tier VALUE are also read off Requiem source comparables.

BOWS are the exception: they carry RFTI_Exclusions_NoDamageRescale + NoBowSpeedRescale, so their source == final. The ForgottenChaosBow was derived at the final AncientNordHoned bow tier (dmg 60) and given the full REQ bow keyword set incl. both exclusions and NPCsUseAmmo. Its crit (7) was COPIED from the comparable, NOT computed as floor(dmg/2) - bows break the floor(dmg/2) rule.

ENCH boundary handled per record: BladesSword/AncientScimitar/GoldenScimitar carry Requiem's OWN balanced enchants (Paralyze6/Fear4/Fire3 via Requiem - Magic Redone.esp) and the DragonPriestStaff carries Requiem's own shock-wall staff enchant - NO magic-lane handoff for those. The modded enchants (Umbra Soul Trap, BladeOfYokuda, TheWithdrawal, Ocato, ForgottenChaosBow) and the Extrication Arrow's projectile Explosion are routed to requiem-magic-patching; only the weapon-side frame (charge/value) was derived here.
Two daggers (TheWithdrawal, Ocato) shipped with NO material keyword - a real gap that drives value/temper tier. Added WeapMaterialSteel (default from their damage band); noted as an assumption.

Umbra (00334E) is flagged, not force-classified: it is a genuine Daedric artifact (artifact keyword set, temper-only, not forge-craftable) but its dmg-24 / WeapMaterialSteel / crit-24 combination is internally inconsistent. Recommended option-a fields provided (Dawnbreaker-tier dmg 13, crit 6); the material keyword + temper perk gate (COBJ 014950) resolve together with that decision.

Clear author errors corrected onto Requiem tiers: ElvenClub (dmg 1 + value 4500 -> elven mace 11/195), DawnOfMan (value 1 + crit 0 -> dragonbone mace 16/8/5200), ForgottenChaosBow (vanilla-tuned dmg 14/speed 0.875/no REQ bow kws -> full AncientNordHoned bow profile). Named-unique values that were already in Requiem's range (steel scimitars at 300, Scorch 500) were KEPT per 'don't change a sensible author value unprovoked.'

All 8 weapon COBJs are grindstone TEMPER recipes (WorkbenchKeyword 088108 = CraftingSmithingSharpeningWheel); the mod ships NO forge recipes for these weapons (consistent with quest/unique/artifact items that temper but aren't forge-crafted). Perk gates derived from Requiem comparables: Craftsmanship 0CB40D + Steel Ingot 05ACE5 (steel swords + bow), Elven Smithing 0CB40F + Refined Moonstone 05AD9F (elven club), Draconic Blacksmithing 052190 + Dragon Bone 03ADA4 (Dawn of Man).

PROJ 037E47 (FastFireBall, Type=Missile) is not ammo-linked and is a spell projectile - consciously skipped to the magic lane, not dropped. PROJ 0021E3 (Extrication arrow) was already on Requiem's arrow physics profile - verified, no change.

Reqtificator masters note: patched melee/bow overrides reference Requiem forms (bow REQ keywords, temper perks) -> Requiem.esp is pulled as a master automatically; masters must be sorted on write. No REQ_NULL_* references were encountered in any patched field.
Leveled-list placement not enumerated in this lane; these are quest/unique/reward weapons - LVLI/placement is a requiem-leveled-list-patching concern.
READ-ONLY: no plugins created, no fields written. All values are derivations.
